title: Canadian Pastry Pie
description: A classic dessert made with flaky pastry and a sweet filling.
instructions: Roll out the flaky pastry and place in a pie dish.
In a separate bowl, mix together the pie filling, granulated sugar, flour, and salt.
Pour the filling mixture into the pastry-lined pie dish.
Dot the top of the filling with unsalted butter.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs and heavy cream.
Pour the egg mixture over the filling.
Bake for 40-50 minutes or until the pastry is golden brown.
Allow the pie to cool before serving.
